content_body: My husband and I came here to celebrate our 35th wedding anniversary. We enjoyed our stay very much. The view is amazing, so relaxing to get away to the mountains in this cozy cabin.  We were here for 9 days and went into Blue Ridge, hiked, played putt putt, we had a lot of fun! Can't wait to come back when it's cold! Time to go back reality now, but we will be back to the mountains soon!
title: Anniversary spent in the Blue Ride Mountains
